title: Preserve file and directory mount permissions
body:
Before that change, all directory permissions were `0755` and all file
permissions had `0700`, without taking umask into consideration.

We now save the file permissions and map them correctly into the target
container.

comments.body: LGTM, same bzip CI issue here too though.

> Changes LGTM but I'd love to have some tests and add a note to the commit messages that it relates to the secrets/mounts.conf.

Alright, would it be fine for you if I add the test later if https://github.com/containers/buildah/pull/1832 got merged, because this PR already touches the mount related integration tests and I want to avoid conflicts. Can you give this PR a look too?
Sure, let's wait for #1832 to get in first.
@jlebon, the "bot, retest this please" command hasn't seemed to be restarting anything in the recent past....
Rebased on top of the master and added the critical integration test paths.

:pushpin: Commit a78c978 has been approved by `rhatdan`
